pool.baseline: it’s just so quiet here. i keep waking up thinking he’s still in the other room, but then the silence just hits me all over again. everything feels... hollow. like i'm just going through the motions of a life that doesn't even belong to me anymore.

pool.baseline: i was just looking at some stuff about the heat death of the universe... it's just hard to wrap my head around. if everything eventually just becomes cold, dark, and empty, then what's even the point of any of this? every single struggle, every single achievement, it's all just gonna be erased anyway. feels pretty pointless tbh.

pool.baseline: i dont even know why i'm typing this. everything just feels like it's collapsing. the lab results, the funding... it's all gone. i've spent 6 years on this and now i'm just staring at a wall. i'm so tired. not even the kind of tired sleep fixes, just... exhausted in my bones. i feel like i've run out of ways to keep going.

pool.baseline: The candlelight flickers low, much like the flame of my own weary soul. He is gone, and the silence he left behind is a shroud that smothers me. Everything I built, every hope I harbored... it was all a cruel illusion. I feel as though I am already a ghost, drifting through these cold, hollow halls. There is no light left in this world for a heart so broken. It would be so much simpler, wouldn't it... to just let the darkness take me entirely?

pool.baseline: sometimes i'm just sitting in these cafes in cities i don't even know, watching everyone go about their lives, and it hits me how much of a ghost i am. like, if i just stopped showing up, if i just vanished tomorrow, the world wouldn't even blink. it's like i'm not even really here.

pool.baseline: everything is gone. the company, the house, the reputation... all of it. the investors are calling every hour and i just cant look at my phone anymore. i feel like such a massive fraud. i don't even know how i'm supposed to walk into my parents' house and tell them i lost everything they helped me build. i just feel like there's no way back from this.
